title: The Straw Hats Become Suspect
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Chopper, Madam Shyarly, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Luffy, Brook. The core story beat is the straw hats become suspect.
scene: The scene centers on the straw hats become suspect, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Chopper, Madam Shyarly, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Luffy, Brook driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the blond boy all right now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh-huh! Thank you for lending us your room, Madame Shirley!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: owner of the mermaid Cafe' "MADAME SHIRLEY" (a make Shark mermaid)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: owner of the Mermaid Cafe'

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could I ask you do stay out of the room, since you're so beautiful and all?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, and you mustn't let Sanji find out that we're at the back of the mermaid Cafe!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: his doctor, chopper-chin, says that something terrible will happen if he finds out where this is, so...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, big mermaid! What's this?

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Her name's Madame Shirley, Luffy-Chin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An unusual prescription indeed... AHAHAH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't go touching that, now, straw hat boys.

dialogue.speaker: Madam Shyarly
dialogue.text: That's a crystal ball, for use in fortune- telling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I don't do any of that any more... it's better not to know the future...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: So do mermaids poop?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How does that have anything do with fortune- telling?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Such a tactless boy...

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: A - Apologise to the Madame, Luffy-Chin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SORRY...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Came. Feel free to take the day off today... you can show your friends around the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?! are you sure?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But of course. There have been so few human pirates around lately that we're not seeing much business at any rate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OH!! That reminds me!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: I have to deliver pappage his clams!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What kind of way is that to remember...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He must be really hungry...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's that? Monsieur Poppagg...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: From what I hear, he's run into an old friend.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're making quite the scene in the cafe' right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't want to mention this back there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take a look!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: But back when the Madame was younger... she said that "lots of pirates will be coming to this island"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the year after that, the great pirate age began.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhAA AAA?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would take forever if I were to go through everything she's predicted... but just recently, things like the war at Marinford...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the death of captain whitebeard... she predicted them all. I think she's become a little fed up of seeing all these terrible things in advance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's pretty scary...

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Come on, Luffy-Chin, usopp-chin - it's this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm...? Where's chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He said he'd stay behind, keep an eye on Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the entrance to the mermaid Cafe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoaaa! I'm feeling hungry already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a Cafe', not a restaurant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's plenty of food, too! We have cakes, and ocean fruits...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What about meat?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Mermaids don't eat meat or fish, so it's just... let's see... Wakeame Bruce, mozuku tart, kombu soulfle'...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: OH! We do have shellfish meat! Scallop sandwiches and clam pizza...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shelifish isn't meat!!! What do you take me for?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's just go inside, yeah?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: That's right! We have to find pappage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OHHHY YEAHH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm talking about real meat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please come again anytime!®

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this?! Luffy-san!! and if it isn't Caimie-san, as well!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! Brook- Chin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AHHHH - BROOK!! SO THIS IS WHERE YOU WERE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HATTY!!! Nosey!!! I've missed you guys so much!!! so you did make it here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: You will come back, won't you, soul king--? It was like a dream having you here!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho hoho!! But of course I will, my beautiful mermaids!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What AAA AAA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's a warm fuzzy feeling in my heart...!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Ah! But of course I don't have a heart, since I'm just Bones!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh... I'm so happy I could die...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah, but no! I am already dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That cafe's really got him into a state, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What on earth happened inside?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it right there!!!

summary: The Straw Hats Become Suspect. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
